nta.declaration: clock cl; int temp; const int a = 2034; const int b = 2102; const int c = 2120; const int d = 2132; const int e = 2143; const int f = 2152; const int g = 2161; const int h = 2169; const int i = 2177; const int j = 2184; const int k = 2192; const int l = 2200; const int m = 2208; const int n = 2216; const int o = 2226; const int p = 2236; const int q = 2249; const int r = 2267; const int s = 2335;
